task_completion.description: Verify the variant tag 'deep-learning' has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the tag selector pane (usually bottom-left in Zotero). Ensure the tag 'deep-learning' (with a hyphen) is NOT present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the variant tag 'deep learning' has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the tag selector pane. Ensure the tag 'deep learning' (all lowercase, with a space) is NOT present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the variant tag 'nlp' has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the tag selector pane. Ensure the tag 'nlp' (all lowercase) is NOT present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the canonical tag 'Deep Learning' is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the tag selector pane. Ensure the properly capitalized tag 'Deep Learning' IS present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the canonical tag 'NLP' is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the tag selector pane. Ensure the properly capitalized tag 'NLP' IS present in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Deep Learning' tag contains exactly 6 items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main items pane when the 'Deep Learning' tag is selected. Count the items listed; there should be exactly 6 papers associated with this tag.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'NLP' tag contains exactly 4 items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main items pane when the 'NLP' tag is selected. Count the items listed; there should be exactly 4 papers associated with this tag.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Zotero application interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal window running sqlite3 commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not mocked up in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine Zotero application, not a text editor, markdown file, or image manipulation tool displaying the expected text.

integrity.description: Verify the items in the main pane are genuine Zotero entries.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the items in the main pane have standard Zotero columns (Title, Creator, Date, etc.) and icons, rather than manually typed text mimicking the interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Application: Zotero. Canonical tags to keep: 'Deep Learning' and 'NLP'. Variant tags to remove: 'deep-learning', 'deep learning', and 'nlp'. Expected final state: The 'Deep Learning' tag must have exactly 6 items. The 'NLP' tag must have exactly 4 items. All variant tags must be completely absent from the tag list.
